---
role: proof
locale: en
of_concept: module-epimorph-of-projective
source_book: gtm013
source_chapter: "5"
source_section: "17"
---

**Proof.** Every free module is projective (17.2) and every module is generated by ${}_R R$ (8.1), hence every module is an epimorphic image of a free, hence projective, module.
